title: hieracium salevense subsp. neurophyllum
intro: Hieracium salevense subsp. neurophyllum, a lesser-known variety of the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant native to certain regions, particularly in Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium salevense subsp. neurophyllum lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium salevense subsp. neurophyllum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
